name: Check CI
instructions:
Wait for CI checks to complete on the PR, then assess the results.

1. Monitor the PR's CI status until all checks finish
2. If ALL checks pass, output tracks: ['pass']
3. If checks fail, determine which domain(s) caused the failure:
   - 'backend' — build errors, type errors, lint failures, or test failures in backend code
   - 'frontend' — build errors, type errors, lint failures, or test failures in frontend code
   - Include both if both domains have failures

Do NOT attempt to fix the issues yourself — just report which tracks need attention.
